name: Guacamole Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and chop the avocados into a bowl.
2. Mash with minced garlic and lemon juice.
3. Add remaining ingredients; mix until chunky.
4. Spoon mixture onto shredded or whole lettuce leaves for individual salads.
5. Top each serving with diced tomato, if desired.
6. Serve with tortilla chips.
7. If preparing ahead of time, save the pits and store the dip covered to prevent darkening.
